summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Supabase Platform Integration (iteration 18). All 19 backend API tests passed for platform health, sessions, benchmark, scenarios, leads, and partners. All frontend features working: Homepage shows 4 cards (Recreatie, Chalet, FEC, Platform Dashboard), Platform Dashboard with 3 tabs (Trends & Benchmark, Lead Scoring, Scenarios), glamping floor plans show open tent layout (SVG), chalet floor plans show room layout (Woonkamer/Slk/Bad), Panorama Dome shows circular/ellipse floor plan.
passed_tests: POST /api/platform/sessions/start creates new session in Supabase
POST /api/platform/sessions/update updates session with lead scoring data
Frontend: Homepage shows 4 cards (Recreatie, Chalet, FEC, Platform Dashboard)
Frontend: Platform Dashboard opens with Trends & Benchmark tab
Frontend: Trends tab shows KPIs (Sessies, Datapunten, Gem. Investering, Top Modellen)
Frontend: Trends tab shows Meest Gekozen Modellen chart with real data
Frontend: Trends tab shows Meest Gekozen Leveranciers chart with real data
Frontend: Lead Scoring tab shows funnel (Oriëntatie/Vergelijking/Concreet)
Frontend: Lead Scoring tab shows Recente Leads list with 6 leads
Frontend: Scenarios tab shows 6 scenario cards (Basis/Luxe/Max Bezetting)
Frontend: Scenarios tab shows Investering, Lease/mnd, Omzet/jaar, ROI, Cashflow/mnd
Frontend: Chalet wizard - glamping models show open tent floor plan (SVG)
Frontend: Chalet wizard - chalet models show room layout (Woonkamer/Slk/Bad)
Frontend: Chalet wizard - Panorama Dome shows circular/ellipse floor plan
Frontend: Back button returns to homepage with all 4 cards

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Platform Dashboard and floor plan features working correctly)

seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing: sessions, benchmark entries, scenarios. Supabase tables already seeded with 3 leads, 3 scenarios, benchmark data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 tested new Supabase integration + Platform Dashboard + glamping floor plan fixes. Key findings: 1) Supabase connection working - health endpoint returns status:connected, tables_ready:true. 2) Platform Dashboard has 3 tabs: Trends & Benchmark (KPIs + charts), Lead Scoring (funnel + lead list), Scenarios (comparison cards). 3) Homepage now has 4 cards: Recreatie Infra, Chalet & Stay, FEC & Experience, Platform Dashboard. 4) Floor plans fixed: glamping models use SVG-based open tent layout with Leefruimte/Slaapruimte, chalets use traditional room layout with Woonkamer/Slk/Bad, Panorama Dome uses ellipse shape. 5) All Supabase APIs working: sessions, benchmark, scenarios, leads, partners. 6) Dutch language UI throughout. 7) Brand colors: cream #FDF9ED, olive #244628, green #70C26C.
